title: Mac Health Check (4.0.0b15)
description: Latest status for organization-managed Macs: macOS version, CrowdStrike, BeyondTrust PM, and Cisco Umbrella

viz_sItF2ahE.title: Latest status for macOS version, CrowdStrike, BeyondTrust PM, and Cisco Umbrella

viz_vdkuy9pO.title: Overall Health
viz_vdkuy9pO.description: Latest status for macOS version, CrowdStrike, BeyondTrust PM, and Cisco Umbrella

viz_VjliKlrl.title: macOS Health
viz_VjliKlrl.description: Latest status for the macOS version check

viz_iwWbcf75.title: CrowdStrike Falcon Health
viz_iwWbcf75.description: Latest status for the CrowdStrike Falcon check

viz_oRqxJZcb.title: BeyondTrust EPM Health
viz_oRqxJZcb.description: Latest status for the BeyondTrust EPM check

viz_tqxnCkGE.title: Cisco Umbrella Health
viz_tqxnCkGE.description: Latest status for the Cisco Umbrella check

options.query:
index=<your_mac_health_check_index> sourcetype=macHealthCheck
| spath path=metadata.serialNumber output=serial_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.serialNumber output=serial_wrapped
| spath path=systemInfo.computerName output=computer_direct
| spath path=event.systemInfo.computerName output=computer_wrapped
| spath path=metadata.hostname output=hostname_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.hostname output=hostname_wrapped
| spath path=metadata.timestamp output=report_ts_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.timestamp output=report_ts_wrapped
| spath path=summary.overallStatus output=overall_direct
| spath path=event.summary.overallStatus output=overall_wrapped
| eval serialNumber=coalesce(serial_direct, serial_wrapped)
| eval computerName=coalesce(computer_direct, computer_wrapped)
| eval hostname=coalesce(hostname_direct, hostname_wrapped)
| eval reportTimestamp=coalesce(report_ts_direct, report_ts_wrapped)
| eval overallStatus=coalesce(overall_direct, overall_wrapped, "unknown")
| eval deviceKey=coalesce(serialNumber, computerName, hostname)
| where isnotnull(deviceKey)
| stats latest(_raw) as latestEvent
        latest(_time) as latestIngestTime
        latest(reportTimestamp) as reportTimestamp
        latest(overallStatus) as originalOverallStatus
        latest(serialNumber) as serialNumber
        latest(computerName) as computerName
        latest(hostname) as hostname
  by deviceKey
| spath input=latestEvent path=systemInfo.macOSBuild output=macOSBuild_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.systemInfo.macOSBuild output=macOSBuild_wrapped
| eval macOSBuild=coalesce(macOSBuild_direct, macOSBuild_wrapped)
| spath input=latestEvent path=checks{} output=checks_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.checks{} output=checks_wrapped
| eval checks=mvappend(checks_direct, checks_wrapped)
| mvexpand checks
| spath input=checks path=key output=checkKey
| search checkKey IN ("macos_version","crowdstrike_falcon","beyondtrust_privilege_management","cisco_umbrella")
| spath input=checks path=status output=checkStatus
| stats first(reportTimestamp) as reportTimestamp
        first(latestIngestTime) as latestIngestTime
        first(originalOverallStatus) as originalOverallStatus
        first(serialNumber) as serialNumber
        first(computerName) as computerName
        first(hostname) as hostname
    values(eval(if(checkKey="macos_version" AND (isnull(macOSBuild) OR NOT match(macOSBuild, "[A-Za-z]$")), checkStatus, null()))) as macosVersionStatus
        values(eval(if(checkKey="crowdstrike_falcon", checkStatus, null()))) as crowdstrikeFalconStatus
        values(eval(if(checkKey="beyondtrust_privilege_management", checkStatus, null()))) as beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus
        values(eval(if(checkKey="cisco_umbrella", checkStatus, null()))) as ciscoUmbrellaStatus
  by deviceKey
| foreach *Status [ eval <<FIELD>>=mvindex('<<FIELD>>',0) ]
| eval overallStatus=case(
    macosVersionStatus="fail" OR crowdstrikeFalconStatus="fail" OR beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus="fail" OR ciscoUmbrellaStatus="fail", "fail",
    macosVersionStatus="warning" OR crowdstrikeFalconStatus="warning" OR beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus="warning" OR ciscoUmbrellaStatus="warning", "warning",
    true(), "healthy"
  )
| eval reportEpoch=coalesce(
    strptime(replace(reportTimestamp,"([+-]\\d\\d):(\\d\\d)$$","\\1\\2"), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z"),
    latestIngestTime
  )
| eval latestReport=strftime(reportEpoch, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %z")
| eval focusRank=case(
    overallStatus="fail", 0,
    overallStatus="warning", 1,
    overallStatus="healthy", 2,
    true(), 3
  )
| sort 0 focusRank overallStatus deviceKey
| rename latestReport as "Latest Report"
         overallStatus as "Overall Status"
         serialNumber as "Serial Number"
         computerName as "Computer Name"
         hostname as "Hostname"
         macosVersionStatus as "macOS Version"
         crowdstrikeFalconStatus as "CrowdStrike Falcon"
         beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus as "BeyondTrust PM"
         ciscoUmbrellaStatus as "Cisco Umbrella"
| table "Latest Report" "Overall Status" "Serial Number" "Computer Name" "Hostname" "macOS Version" "CrowdStrike Falcon" "BeyondTrust PM" "Cisco Umbrella"

index=<your_mac_health_check_index> sourcetype=macHealthCheck
| spath path=metadata.serialNumber output=serial_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.serialNumber output=serial_wrapped
| spath path=systemInfo.computerName output=computer_direct
| spath path=event.systemInfo.computerName output=computer_wrapped
| spath path=metadata.hostname output=hostname_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.hostname output=hostname_wrapped
| spath path=metadata.timestamp output=report_ts_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.timestamp output=report_ts_wrapped
| spath path=summary.overallStatus output=overall_direct
| spath path=event.summary.overallStatus output=overall_wrapped
| eval serialNumber=coalesce(serial_direct, serial_wrapped)
| eval computerName=coalesce(computer_direct, computer_wrapped)
| eval hostname=coalesce(hostname_direct, hostname_wrapped)
| eval reportTimestamp=coalesce(report_ts_direct, report_ts_wrapped)
| eval overallStatus=coalesce(overall_direct, overall_wrapped, "unknown")
| eval deviceKey=coalesce(serialNumber, computerName, hostname)
| where isnotnull(deviceKey)
| stats latest(_raw) as latestEvent
        latest(_time) as latestIngestTime
        latest(reportTimestamp) as reportTimestamp
        latest(overallStatus) as originalOverallStatus
        latest(serialNumber) as serialNumber
        latest(computerName) as computerName
        latest(hostname) as hostname
  by deviceKey
| spath input=latestEvent path=systemInfo.macOSBuild output=macOSBuild_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.systemInfo.macOSBuild output=macOSBuild_wrapped
| eval macOSBuild=coalesce(macOSBuild_direct, macOSBuild_wrapped)
| spath input=latestEvent path=checks{} output=checks_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.checks{} output=checks_wrapped
| eval checks=mvappend(checks_direct, checks_wrapped)
| mvexpand checks
| spath input=checks path=key output=checkKey
| search checkKey IN ("macos_version","crowdstrike_falcon","beyondtrust_privilege_management","cisco_umbrella")
| spath input=checks path=status output=checkStatus
| stats first(reportTimestamp) as reportTimestamp
        first(latestIngestTime) as latestIngestTime
        first(originalOverallStatus) as originalOverallStatus
        first(serialNumber) as serialNumber
        first(computerName) as computerName
        first(hostname) as hostname
    values(eval(if(checkKey="macos_version" AND (isnull(macOSBuild) OR NOT match(macOSBuild, "[A-Za-z]$")), checkStatus, null()))) as macosVersionStatus
        values(eval(if(checkKey="crowdstrike_falcon", checkStatus, null()))) as crowdstrikeFalconStatus
        values(eval(if(checkKey="beyondtrust_privilege_management", checkStatus, null()))) as beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus
        values(eval(if(checkKey="cisco_umbrella", checkStatus, null()))) as ciscoUmbrellaStatus
  by deviceKey
| foreach *Status [ eval <<FIELD>>=mvindex('<<FIELD>>',0) ]
| eval overallStatus=case(
    macosVersionStatus="fail" OR crowdstrikeFalconStatus="fail" OR beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus="fail" OR ciscoUmbrellaStatus="fail", "fail",
    macosVersionStatus="warning" OR crowdstrikeFalconStatus="warning" OR beyondtrustPrivilegeManagementStatus="warning" OR ciscoUmbrellaStatus="warning", "warning",
    true(), "healthy"
  )
| stats count by overallStatus
| eventstats sum(count) as total
| eval pct=round((count/total)*100, 1)
| eval sortOrder=case(
    overallStatus="fail", 1,
    overallStatus="warning", 2,
    overallStatus="healthy", 3,
    true(), 4
  )
| sort sortOrder
| fields overallStatus count pct

index=<your_mac_health_check_index> sourcetype=macHealthCheck
| spath path=metadata.serialNumber output=serial_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.serialNumber output=serial_wrapped
| spath path=systemInfo.computerName output=computer_direct
| spath path=event.systemInfo.computerName output=computer_wrapped
| spath path=metadata.hostname output=hostname_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.hostname output=hostname_wrapped
| eval serialNumber=coalesce(serial_direct, serial_wrapped)
| eval computerName=coalesce(computer_direct, computer_wrapped)
| eval hostname=coalesce(hostname_direct, hostname_wrapped)
| eval deviceKey=coalesce(serialNumber, computerName, hostname)
| where isnotnull(deviceKey)
| stats latest(_raw) as latestEvent by deviceKey
| spath input=latestEvent path=systemInfo.macOSBuild output=macOSBuild_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.systemInfo.macOSBuild output=macOSBuild_wrapped
| eval macOSBuild=coalesce(macOSBuild_direct, macOSBuild_wrapped)
| where isnull(macOSBuild) OR NOT match(macOSBuild, "[A-Za-z]$")
| spath input=latestEvent path=checks{} output=checks_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.checks{} output=checks_wrapped
| eval checks=mvappend(checks_direct, checks_wrapped)
| mvexpand checks
| spath input=checks path=key output=checkKey
| search checkKey="macos_version"
| spath input=checks path=status output=status
| eval status=coalesce(status, "unknown")
| stats count by status
| eventstats sum(count) as total
| eval pct=round((count/total)*100, 1)
| eval sortOrder=case(
    status="fail", 1,
    status="warning", 2,
    status="healthy", 3,
    status="unknown", 4,
    true(), 5
  )
| sort sortOrder
| fields status count pct

index=<your_mac_health_check_index> sourcetype=macHealthCheck
| spath path=metadata.serialNumber output=serial_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.serialNumber output=serial_wrapped
| spath path=systemInfo.computerName output=computer_direct
| spath path=event.systemInfo.computerName output=computer_wrapped
| spath path=metadata.hostname output=hostname_direct
| spath path=event.metadata.hostname output=hostname_wrapped
| eval serialNumber=coalesce(serial_direct, serial_wrapped)
| eval computerName=coalesce(computer_direct, computer_wrapped)
| eval hostname=coalesce(hostname_direct, hostname_wrapped)
| eval deviceKey=coalesce(serialNumber, computerName, hostname)
| where isnotnull(deviceKey)
| stats latest(_raw) as latestEvent by deviceKey
| spath input=latestEvent path=checks{} output=checks_direct
| spath input=latestEvent path=event.checks{} output=checks_wrapped
| eval checks=mvappend(checks_direct, checks_wrapped)
| mvexpand checks
| spath input=checks path=key output=checkKey
| search checkKey="filevault_encryption"
| spath input=checks path=status output=status
| eval status=coalesce(status, "unknown")
| stats count as deviceCount sum(eval(status="healthy")) as healthyCount
| eval healthyPct=round((healthyCount/deviceCount)*100, 1)
| fields healthyPct
